briefdescription: Register two images using the phase correlation method.
detaileddescription: PhaseCorrelationImageRegistrationMethod implements the phase correlation algorithm to estimate the translation between two images. The method computes the cross-power spectrum and finds the peak to determine the shift. Optionally, band-pass filtering can be applied to improve robustness.
